remove_yellow_parts_from_mold.query: a worker removes small yellow molded parts from the open metal mold and places them on the tray to the right
remove_yellow_parts_from_mold.prompt:
Event: a worker removes small yellow molded parts from the open metal mold and places them on the tray to the right
Locate this event in the 20-second video. Return exactly one JSON object: {"start_s": number, "end_s": number}. If the event is absent, return {"start_s": null, "end_s": null}. Times are seconds from video start.
